action.content: Write a 30-line poem with short sentences without any comma. Each line should contain exactly one sentence. Make sure that you put the right punctuation at the end of each line. Your entire response should contain the poem only.
action.label: context

action.content:
The sun rises high above the hill.
The birds begin their morning song.
The wind blows through the green trees.
The flowers bloom in the garden.
The children play in the park.
The dogs run in the street.
The rain falls softly on the roof.
The clouds gather in the sky.
The moon shines bright at night.
The stars appear in the dark.
The fire burns in the hearth.
The coffee tastes warm and sweet.
